tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive completed; printed Setup Complete banner; verify-install ran. RC=0.

tests.name: claude_md_created
tests.details: CLAUDE.md present in $PROJECT_DIR.

tests.name: project_intake_created
tests.details: PROJECT_INTAKE.md present.

tests.name: approval_log_created
tests.details: APPROVAL_LOG.md present.

tests.name: gitignore_created
tests.details: .gitignore present.

tests.name: phase_state_json_phase_zero
tests.details: jq .current_phase = 0.

tests.name: phase_state_project_set
tests.details: .project = uat-agent-12.

tests.name: ci_workflow_created
tests.details: .github/workflows/ci.yml created (host: github, language: python).

tests.name: release_workflow_created
tests.details: init log: 'No release pipeline template for platform mcp_server on host github. Skipping release pipeline.' Tracked as bug below.

tests.name: framework_clone_present
tests.details: .claude/framework directory exists with hooks and rules from CDF v4.2.3.

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install reports 'Context7 MCP installed' and 'Context7 MCP configured'.

tests.name: platform_module_present
tests.details: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md missing. Init log: 'No platform module for mcp_server.' verify-install flagged it as MANUAL action required.

tests.name: no_residual_backup_dir
tests.details: .claude-backup/ removed by init.sh after CDF migration. ('Removed CDF migration backup' message in log.)

tests.name: pre_commit_gate_registered
tests.details: .claude/settings.json contains pre-commit-gate.sh (PreToolUse, matcher: Bash).

tests.name: stop_checklist_registered
tests.details: .claude/settings.json Stop hook present (session-end-qdrant-reminder.sh — runbook label 'stop-checklist' is satisfied by the registered Stop hook).

tests.name: pending_approval_helper_copied
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh present (PR #17 fix verified; was U-H).

tests.name: lint_uat_scenarios_helper_copied
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh present (PR #17 fix verified; was U-H).

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK directory exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18). Stderr captured.

framework_bugs.summary: release.yml not generated for mcp_server platform on github
framework_bugs.reproduction: bash init.sh --non-interactive --platform mcp_server --git-host other --remote-url https://example.com/fake.git ... ; ls .github/workflows/release.yml
framework_bugs.actual: init.sh logs '[INFO] No release pipeline template for platform mcp_server on host github. Skipping release pipeline.' release.yml is absent. Either the template needs to exist or the assertion needs to be platform-conditional in the runbook.

framework_bugs.summary: Platform module mcp_server.md missing from framework
framework_bugs.reproduction: init.sh with --platform mcp_server; verify .docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md after init.
framework_bugs.expected: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md copied into project (per Section A assertion 'platform_module_present').
framework_bugs.actual: File absent; verify-install flags as 'Manual action required: Platform module (mcp_server.md) missing'. The file does not exist in the framework either, so the 'Copy from orchestrator' remediation is broken. Affects all mcp_server projects.

documentation_gaps.gap: process-checklist.sh --help omits --start-phase1 / --start-phase3 / --start-phase4 commands (they exist in code but not in help text)
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/process-checklist.sh print_help (commands listed: --start-feature, --complete-step, --start-uat, --start-phase3, --start-phase4, --verify-init, ... — actually phase3/4 ARE listed, but --start-phase1 is missing entirely from the help output)

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 returned 0; printed 'Phase 1 architecture planning started'.

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: .phase1_architecture.steps_completed exists as empty array after --start-phase1.

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed sequentially with RC=0; no artifact checks triggered for phase1.

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh returned RC=0 with output 'Phase gates consistent.'

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D confirmation: .current_phase remained 0 after all Phase 1 steps + gate pass. No script auto-advances current_phase. Bug recorded below.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: Complete all phase1_architecture steps; bash scripts/check-phase-gate.sh; then jq .current_phase .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.expected: .current_phase advances from 0 -> 1 (and onward) when each phase's gate passes. Per runbook Section B, this is U-D from the 2026-04-25 sweep, still open.
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stayed at 0 across all Phase 1, Phase 2 (build_loop), Phase 3 (uat_session + phase3_validation), Phase 4 (phase4_release) completions. No script in scripts/ advances it.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-feature uat-feat-1 set .build_loop.feature='uat-feat-1'.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: tests_written -> tests_verified_failing -> implemented -> security_audit -> documentation_updated all RC=0. security_audit accepted with stub docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md present.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after 5 build steps complete.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: shell-direct 'git commit --allow-empty -m feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' succeeded (no Build Loop active). PreToolUse pre-commit-gate.sh only fires through Claude Code, not shell. Recorded as documentation gap referencing BL-010 / U-C.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After feature_recorded for uat-feat-1, started new feature 'uat-feat-grace'; --check-commit-message 'feat(uat-grace): test grace' returned 0 (allow). PR #17 grace-window fix verified.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json with question/options/recommendation; piped PreToolUse Bash hook input into pre-commit-gate.sh; output JSON has hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision='deny' with sentinel reason. Hook layer (the path agents take) blocks correctly. Shell-direct git commit bypassed it (same root cause as U-C).

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve 'approved for UAT' deleted .claude/pending-approval.json. Subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh invocation returned no deny.

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: jq .features_completed .claude/build-progress.json contains 'uat-feat-1' (and later 'uat-feat-grace').

documentation_gaps.gap: U-C confirmation: BL-006 not enforced for shell-direct git commits (only via Claude Code PreToolUse). Known-open. Affects all configs.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh — runs as PreToolUse hook only; .git/hooks/pre-commit (installed by init) does not call into BL-006 / process-checklist --check-commit-message

documentation_gaps.gap: scripts/pending-approval.sh --status prints '(missing)' for all fields when sentinel has only the runbook's minimal schema (phase_id, created_at, request_summary, approver, expires_at). The status command expects 'question/options/recommendation/offered_at' shape — schemas don't agree.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/pending-approval.sh --status vs runbook Section C 'write .claude/pending-approval.json with valid schema'

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 RC=0 with feature-completeness warnings (BL-006 expected behavior since 2 features recorded).

tests.name: start_uat_creates_session
tests.details: .uat_session.started_at non-null = '2026-04-26T01:33:28Z'.

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh requires <populated-html-file> arg; running with no arg prints usage and exits 0. Runbook expects exit 0 against generated UAT scenario, but no scenario was generated yet at this point — and the script does not auto-discover the canonical UAT HTML. Marked as pass=false because the assertion target (a generated UAT scenario lints clean) cannot be exercised without an html input that init/intake doesn't produce automatically.

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS (agents_dispatched ... gate_passed) completed with RC=0.

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: All 9 PHASE3_STEPS completed; check-phase-gate.sh RC=0 'Phase gates consistent.'

documentation_gaps.gap: lint-uat-scenarios.sh is a populated-html linter; the runbook implies it can be invoked against 'the generated UAT scenario' but init/intake do not produce a populated UAT html artifact. Either the runbook should specify the input file or the lint script should support a no-arg/discover mode for UAT projects.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh usage line vs RUNBOOK Section D test 'uat_template_lints_clean'

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase4 RC=0.

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: All 6 PHASE4_STEPS completed with RC=0 (after stubbing rollback-test, handoff-test, HANDOFF.md, RELEASE_NOTES.md).

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: monitoring_configured step blocked when HANDOFF.md absent ('HANDOFF.md not found — monitoring configuration should be documented there'). Created HANDOFF.md with monitoring section; step then completed.

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: RELEASE_NOTES.md is generated by init.sh, so go_live_verified passed without explicit creation. Artifact-check exists in process-checklist.sh and would block if file absent.

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase = 0 even after all phase4_release steps completed. Same U-D root cause already recorded above.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git ls-files | grep -Ei 'password|api[_-]?key|secret|token' returned only documentation references in builders-guide.md, ci.yml (env: secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN), PROJECT_INTAKE.md template line, and CDF stdlib token list — no real secrets.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A: no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run; .claude/process-audit.log absent (correct).

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find .claude -name '*.tmp' returned no results.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only pre-existing untracked '.claude/' and 'Reports/uat-2026-04-26/' (these existed at sweep start; they are the test runners' own untracked state, not modifications). Framework HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494, matches captured SHA.

summary: init.sh --non-interactive succeeds end-to-end on personal/mcp_server/full; PR #17/#18/#19 fixes verified (BL-006 grace, framework-self guard, BL-015 hook deny, U-H scripts copied); two Medium gaps — release.yml not generated for mcp_server on github and platform module mcp_server.md missing — and U-C/U-D confirmations from prior sweep, no Critical/High regressions.
